name: app.R
app.R_2

library(shiny) library(dplyr) library(DT) library(stringr) load("SmallVQR24.RData") options(shiny.maxRequestSize = 100 * 1024^2) pos_norm_100 <- function(pos, denom) { case_when( is.na(denom) ~ NA_real_, denom == 1 ~ 1, TRUE ~ floor((pos - 1) / (denom - 1) * 99) + 1 ) } dt_style <- function(df, title = NULL) { datatable( df, rownames = FALSE, class = "compact stripe hover", filter = "top", extensions = c("Buttons", "FixedHeader"), caption = if (!is.null(title)) tags$caption( style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;", title ), options = list( dom = "Blrtip", buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel"), scrollX = TRUE, pageLength = 30, lengthMenu = list(c(10, 30, 50, -1), c("10", "30", "50", "All")), autoWidth = TRUE, orderClasses = TRUE, fixedHeader = TRUE ) ) %>% formatStyle( columns = "R", backgroundColor = styleInterval( c(0.8, 0.9, 0.99, 1.1), c("red", "orange", "#fff3b0", "#d9f2d9", "#2ca25f") ) ) %>% formatStyle( columns = "POS_NORM_100", backgroundColor = styleInterval( c(25, 50, 75), c("#2ca25f", "#a1d99b", "#fdae6b", "#de2d26") ), color = "black" ) } universita_choices <- bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.3` %>% distinct(Istituzione) %>% arrange(Istituzione) %>% pull(Istituzione) precompute_uni <- function(u) { list( t33 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.3` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo a+b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV = source_file, R, IRAS = IRAS1_2x100, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t31 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.1` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo a)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV = source_file, R, IRAS = IRAS1x100, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t32 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.2` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV = source_file, R, IRAS = IRAS2x100, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t36 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.6` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a+b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD = GSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t34 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.4` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD = GSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t35 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.5` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD = GSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t39 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.9` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a+b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, SSD = SSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t37 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.7` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, SSD = SSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t38 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 3.8` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. istituzioni compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min") ) %>% transmute(Rank, SSD = SSD_ric, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t43 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.3` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo a+b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), IRD = IRD1_2x100, GEV = source_file ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV, Dipartimento, R, IRD, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t41 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.1` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo a)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), IRD = IRD1x100, GEV = source_file ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV, Dipartimento, R, IRD, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t42 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.2` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( source_file = str_remove(source_file, "GEV"), R = `R (profilo b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), IRD = IRD2x100, GEV = source_file ) %>% transmute(Rank, GEV, Dipartimento, R, IRD, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t46 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.6` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a+b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), GSD = GSD_ric ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD, Dipartimento, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t44 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.4` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo a)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), GSD = GSD_ric ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD, Dipartimento, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank), t45 = bound_by_sheet$`Tabella 4.5` %>% filter(Istituzione == u) %>% mutate( R = `R (profilo b)`, POS_NORM_100 = pos_norm_100(`Pos. grad. compl.`, `Num. dipartimenti compl.`), Rank = rank(-R, ties.method = "min"), GSD = GSD_ric ) %>% transmute(Rank, GSD, Dipartimento, R, POS_NORM_100) %>% arrange(Rank) ) } all_precomp <- setNames(lapply(universita_choices, precompute_uni), universita_choices) ui <- navbarPage( title = "VQR 2020-2024 Atenei", header = tagList( tags$style(HTML(" body { font-size: 14px; } table.dataTable tbody td { padding-top: 2px; padding-bottom: 2px; } .selectize-input { min-height: 38px; } .note-box { background: #f8f9fa; border-left: 4px solid #0d6efd; padding: 12px 16px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 6px; } .footer { margin-top: 20px; padding: 14px 20px; background: #f8f9fa; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #444; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5; } .footer a { color: #0d6efd; text-decoration: none; } .footer a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .dataTables_wrapper { width: 100%; } table.dataTable { width: 100% !important; } div.dataTables_scrollHeadInner, div.dataTables_scrollHeadInner table { width: 100% !important; } ")) ), tabPanel("Area GEV", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel( width = 3, selectInput("uni", "Seleziona università", choices = universita_choices), div(class = "note-box", HTML("Note
- R verde se > 1, arancio se ≤ 1.
- POS_NORM_100: 1 = migliori posizioni, 100 = peggiori.
- Filtri e download CSV/Excel disponibili.") ) ), mainPanel(tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Tab. 3.3 a+b", DTOutput("tab33")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.1 a", DTOutput("tab31")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.2 b", DTOutput("tab32")) )) ) ), tabPanel("GSD Ateneo", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4(textOutput("uni_label_1"))), mainPanel(tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Tab. 3.6 a+b", DTOutput("tab36")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.4 a", DTOutput("tab34")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.5 b", DTOutput("tab35")) )) ) ), tabPanel("SSD Ateneo", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4(textOutput("uni_label_2"))), mainPanel(tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Tab. 3.9 a+b", DTOutput("tab39")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.7 a", DTOutput("tab37")), tabPanel("Tab. 3.8 b", DTOutput("tab38")) )) ) ), tabPanel("Dipartimenti", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4(textOutput("uni_label_3"))), mainPanel(tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Tab. 4.3 a+b", DTOutput("tab43")), tabPanel("Tab. 4.1 a", DTOutput("tab41")), tabPanel("Tab. 4.2 b", DTOutput("tab42")) )) ) ), tabPanel("Dipartimenti e GSD", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4(textOutput("uni_label_4"))), mainPanel(tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Tab. 4.6 a+b", DTOutput("tab46")), tabPanel("Tab. 4.4 a", DTOutput("tab44")), tabPanel("Tab. 4.5 b", DTOutput("tab45")) )) ) ), footer = tags$footer( class = "footer", tags$div( style = "max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;", HTML("A. Irpino - DMF - Unicampania "), tags$a(href = "mailto:antonio.irpino@unicampania.it", "antonio.irpino@unicampania.it"), HTML("  |  Elaborazioni su dati VQR 2024 pubblicati qui: "), tags$a( href = "https://www.anvur.it/it/ricerca/qualita-della-ricerca/rapporti-di-valutazione/vqr-2020-2024", target = "_blank", rel = "noopener noreferrer", "AVA 2024 data" ) ) ) ) server <- function(input, output, session) { current <- reactive({ req(input$uni) all_precomp[[input$uni]] }) output$uni_label_1 <- renderText(input$uni) output$uni_label_2 <- renderText(input$uni) output$uni_label_3 <- renderText(input$uni) output$uni_label_4 <- renderText(input$uni) output$tab33 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t33, "Tabella 3.3 - Profilo a+b")) output$tab31 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t31, "Tabella 3.1 - Profilo a")) output$tab32 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t32, "Tabella 3.2 - Profilo b")) output$tab36 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t36, "Tabella 3.6 - GSD profilo a+b")) output$tab34 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t34, "Tabella 3.4 - GSD profilo a")) output$tab35 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t35, "Tabella 3.5 - GSD profilo b")) output$tab39 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t39, "Tabella 3.9 - SSD profilo a+b")) output$tab37 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t37, "Tabella 3.7 - SSD profilo a")) output$tab38 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t38, "Tabella 3.8 - SSD profilo b")) output$tab43 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t43, "Tabella 4.3 - a+b")) output$tab41 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t41, "Tabella 4.1 - a")) output$tab42 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t42, "Tabella 4.2 - b")) output$tab46 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t46, "Tabella 4.6 - a+b")) output$tab44 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t44, "Tabella 4.4 - a")) output$tab45 <- renderDT(dt_style(current()$t45, "Tabella 4.5 - b")) } shinyApp(ui, server)
